note.soap:
SUBJECTIVE:
- Chief concern: it burns when I pee

OBJECTIVE:
- Phone encounter; no vitals or exam performed.

ASSESSMENT:
- it burns when I pee (insufficient data for definitive diagnosis based on available answers).

PLAN:
- Provide supportive guidance and return precautions.
- If symptoms worsen or red flags develop, seek urgent in-person evaluation.
- If persistent, clinician review recommended for targeted testing and treatment plan.

evidence.title: Chlamydia - NHS
evidence.snippet: bleeding after sex or between periods a burning feeling when you pee pain in your lower tummy Symptoms in men Chlamydia can cause symptoms in men. These symptoms can affect anyone with a penis: white, cloudy or watery discharge from the tip of your penis burning and itching around the testicles (balls) and penis pain and swelling in the testicles a burning f…

evidence.snippet: in your bladder Pain or burning when you pee Dark, cloudy, or reddish-colored urine Bad smelling urine Weakness, fatigue , or confusion, mainly in older people Fever , which may be a sign of a kidney infection If you have symptoms of a UTI, it's important to see your provider so you can start treatment right away, if needed.
